subject: Question about enterprise pricing
body: Hi, I'm interested in your enterprise plan. Could you provide more details on pricing and features? Thanks, Sarah.

subject: URGENT: System outage - production down
body: Our production environment is completely down. All services are returning 503 errors. We've been trying to restore but nothing works. This is affecting our entire customer base. We need immediate assistance.

subject: URGENT - Account locked
body: I've been locked out of my account after multiple failed login attempts. I need access urgently to process payroll. Please unlock my account immediately or reset my password.

subject: Weekly Digest: July Updates
body: Here are the latest product updates and blog posts from our team.
